name: Firewall Disabled via Netsh
description: Detects attempts to disable the Windows Firewall using the `netsh` command-line utility.

prompts.prompt: Windows Firewall disabled via `netsh` command, indicating a high-risk defense evasion attempt. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}, **Image** {Image}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}. Investigate this critical event immediately for unauthorized system modification and potential follow-on activity.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that attempted to disable the firewall.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to disable the firewall.
